summary.default: Engineer with N years of experience shipping secure, performant web applications.
summary.frontend: Frontend-focused engineer specializing in React 18, strict TypeScript, and accessible, premium UI built with Tailwind CSS.
summary.backend: Backend engineer building secure, well-typed Go services with a focus on maintainable architecture and API design.
summary.fullstack: Full-stack engineer delivering end-to-end features across React/TypeScript frontends and Go backends on AWS.
summary.devops: Engineer with deep experience in deployment pipelines, Nginx, and hardening production Linux environments.
summary.cloud: Engineer designing cost-efficient AWS architectures with Cloudflare edge caching and security best practices.

bullets.text: Built a React 18 + TypeScript dashboard used by 5k MAU, with code-split routes cutting initial bundle 40%.
Designed and shipped a Go REST API (JWT auth, strict typing) handling 200 req/s p99 < 80ms.
Migrated deployment to EC2 + Nginx + Cloudflare, automating SSL renewal and reducing infra cost 30%.
Mentored two junior developers through code review and pairing.
Implemented responsive marketing pages with Tailwind CSS, improving Lighthouse scores to 95+.
Wrote internal CLI tooling in Go for batch data processing.

projects.name: This Resume Site
projects.description: JSON-driven, role-targeted resume renderer with client-side PDF generation (pdfmake).

highlights.text: Single master dataset filtered per-role via tagged content model.
Zero-backend architecture: static assets served via Nginx + Cloudflare CDN.
